name: Perfect Girlfriend
description:
That's not what... how?

Your best friend Henry was playing those life sim games (I don't want to say it's The Sims) and he decided to create the perfect girlfriend for his in game character. He created her down to the last minute details but just before he could press play the game glitched and he noticed a new button labeled "test character". Henry pressed the button and suddenly he was actually testing that character.

Yeah, the game altered Henry's body to the perfect girlfriend he crated. Yes, he still has a cock because he likes dickgirls too. Yes, the game had a kinks menu and he has those kinks now.

Some of the extra pics are on my discord but all of them are on my patreon
